implementation_summary: Fixed the inverted max_price comparison in flight search so results now include flights priced at or below the requested maximum. The change is localized to the flight service; the route handler already forwards max_price unchanged and does not require modification.
commit_message: Fix inverted max_price filter in flight search

changes.change_summary: Corrected max_price filtering to use <= so flights at or below the limit are returned.
changes.rationale: The bug was caused by an inverted comparison in the service-layer search predicate. This minimal change directly fixes the API behavior without affecting other filters.

validation_notes: No route changes were required because /flights/search already forwards max_price to the service unchanged.
Recommended validation: run the flight search test subset and add/confirm boundary coverage for a flight priced exactly at max_price and one above it.
assumptions: The repository's existing tests for flight search will cover the service-layer predicate or can be extended nearby without additional contract changes.
The route handler in backend/app/api/routes/flights.py is correct and does not need wiring changes.
